# Law Enforcement Directive

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Directive (EU) 2016/680
Authority: European Union
Source URL: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32016L0680
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, security_breach, cross_border_transfer, accountability
Keywords: Law Enforcement Directive, LED, competent authorities, criminal offences, law enforcement processing, EU执法数据保护

## Summary
EU data protection directive for competent authorities processing personal data for law-enforcement purposes.

## Key compliance obligations
- Define lawful processing purposes for law-enforcement data.
- Keep data accurate, secure, and retained only as needed.
- Support rights and safeguards subject to law-enforcement restrictions.
